citation.description: Ticket comment from author Joe Oakhart names all 16 children (c085, 0b96, ed13, 8bc5, 3275, 18e6, 3c07, 5062, 7931, 555e, c595, 1f77, 538c, 2f8e, 9a5a, 121b) and attests rebar list-descendants returns 15 tasks + 1 story with status=closed for all (still-open count: 0). Independently verified via show_ticket: c085, 0b96, ed13, 9a5a all return status=closed.

criteria.criterion: All child tickets are closed (epic rollup), verified by `rebar list --epic <this> --status open` returning none.

`rebar metrics --since 2026-01-01 --until 2026-07-01 --output json` exits 0 and emits JSON where every registered metric key is present with either a value or `{"unavailable":{"reason","accruing_since"}}` â€” an integration test asserts via jq-e that no registered metric key is absent.

Every metric entry carries `source` and `confidence`, and a `source=backfill_classified` value is never aggregated into an authoritative structural series â€” a unit test asserts `is_authoritative('backfill_classified')` is False and the segregation holds.

Bug-close friction stays flat: the required free-text reason is replaced (not supplemented) by a bounded `--class` enum persisted on the STATUS event, verified by `rebar show <closed-bug> --output json | jq -e '.close_class'`, AND a `rebar transition --help` diff shows no net increase in required bug-close arguments.

Backfill is validated: at least one backfilled `caused_by`/`close_class`/snapshot value exists carrying `source=backfill_classified` + `confidence=classified`, asserted by a test over the backfill output.
